name: Shared Infrastructure
description: Foundation: TypeScript types, Zod schemas, Zustand store, UI primitives, layouts, constants, test setup
acceptanceCriteria: All TypeScript types in src/types/resume.ts compile without errors
Zod schemas in src/lib/schemas/resume-schema.ts validate correct data and reject invalid data
Zustand store exposes all CRUD methods for every resume section
UI primitives (Button, Input, Textarea, Label, Dialog, Tabs, Toast, Card) render and pass accessibility checks
Root layout includes fonts, metadata, theme provider, and security headers
Tailwind config includes all custom colors and design tokens
Constants file defines template list, skill levels, field limits, and default accent color
Test setup file configures jsdom environment with Testing Library matchers

name: Resume Form Editor
description: Multi-section form for entering all resume data with real-time validation
acceptanceCriteria: Given the builder page loads, When I start typing in any field, Then the preview updates within 200ms
Given I am in the Experience section, When I click 'Add Experience', Then a new empty experience form appears with all required fields
Given I have multiple experiences, When I drag an experience to a new position, Then the order updates in both the form and preview
Given I leave a required field empty (fullName, email), When I attempt to download, Then a validation error highlights the missing field
Given I enter an invalid email format, When the field loses focus, Then an inline error message appears
Given I check 'Currently Working', When the form updates, Then the end date field is hidden and 'Present' shows in the preview

name: Real-Time PDF Preview
description: Live preview panel that renders the resume exactly as it will appear in the downloaded PDF
acceptanceCriteria: Given I type in any form field, When the input changes, Then the preview panel re-renders within 200ms
Given the preview is visible, When I view it on desktop (>=1024px), Then it displays side-by-side with the form editor
Given I am on mobile (<768px), When I tap 'Preview', Then the preview shows full-screen in a bottom sheet
Given the preview renders, When compared pixel-for-pixel to the downloaded PDF, Then they are identical in layout

name: Five Resume Templates
description: Five distinct, professional, ATS-friendly resume templates: Modern, Classic, Minimal, Creative, Professional
acceptanceCriteria: Given I am on the builder page, When I click a template thumbnail, Then the preview immediately switches to that template
Given any template is selected, When the resume contains all section types, Then all sections render correctly without overlap or truncation
Given any template renders, When parsed by standard ATS software, Then all text content is extractable (no text-as-image)
Given I switch templates, When the preview updates, Then no resume data is lost
Given a template renders a full-page resume, When the content exceeds one page, Then it cleanly flows to a second page with consistent headers

name: Instant PDF Download
description: One-click client-side PDF generation and download via jsPDF + html2canvas
acceptanceCriteria: Given my resume has at minimum fullName and email filled in, When I click 'Download PDF', Then a PDF file downloads within 2 seconds
Given the PDF downloads, When I open it in any PDF reader, Then the layout matches the preview exactly
Given the PDF generates, When I check network requests, Then zero HTTP requests are made to any server (fully client-side)
Given the PDF generates, When I copy text from it, Then all text is selectable and copyable (not rasterized images)
Given the downloaded file, When I check the filename, Then it is formatted as '{FullName}_Resume.pdf'

name: LocalStorage Persistence
description: Auto-save all resume data to browser localStorage with debounced writes
acceptanceCriteria: Given I type in any form field, When 1 second passes without further input (debounce), Then the resume data is saved to localStorage
Given I saved data previously, When I return to the site, Then all my data is restored exactly as I left it
Given localStorage is full or unavailable, When the save fails, Then a non-blocking toast warns the user
Given I want to start fresh, When I click 'New Resume', Then a confirmation dialog appears before clearing data

name: Landing Page with Counter-Positioning Copy
description: SEO-optimized landing page with anti-paywall messaging targeting Zety frustration
acceptanceCriteria: Given a user lands on the homepage, When the page loads, Then the hero section displays 'Free Resume Builder — No Paywall, No Tricks' above the fold
Given the page content, When I search for counter-positioning copy, Then at least 3 distinct anti-paywall messages appear
Given the page, When I look for a CTA, Then a prominent 'Build Your Resume — It's Free' button is visible above the fold
Given the page loads, When I measure Largest Contentful Paint, Then LCP is under 2.5 seconds
Given the page source, When I inspect meta tags, Then title, description, and OG tags target 'free resume builder no paywall' and 'Zety free alternative' keywords

name: Shareable Resume Preview Link
description: Generate a URL with compressed resume data in the hash fragment for server-free sharing
acceptanceCriteria: Given I have a resume with data, When I click 'Share', Then a URL is generated containing the resume data encoded in a URL-safe format
Given the URL is generated, When I copy and open it in a new browser, Then the resume renders in read-only preview mode with all data intact
Given a shared URL, When it exceeds 8KB of data, Then the data is compressed (pako/gzip) before base64url encoding
Given a shared URL, When the recipient views it, Then they see a 'Build Your Own — It's Free' CTA but cannot edit the resume
Given a shared URL, When it is opened, Then no data is sent to any server (decoded entirely client-side)

name: JSON Import/Export
description: Export resume data as JSON file and import from JSON for cross-browser portability
acceptanceCriteria: Given I click 'Export JSON', When the file saves, Then it contains the complete resume data as valid JSON
Given I have a valid resume JSON file, When I click 'Import JSON' and select it, Then all data loads into the form and preview
Given I import an invalid JSON file, When the parse fails, Then an error toast appears and no data is overwritten
Given the exported JSON, When I inspect it, Then it conforms to the Resume TypeScript type schema

name: Print-Optimized Stylesheet
description: CSS print styles so Ctrl+P prints only the resume without UI chrome
acceptanceCriteria: Given I press Ctrl+P / Cmd+P on the preview page, When the print dialog opens, Then only the resume renders (no UI chrome, no navigation)
Given the print layout, When printed on US Letter paper, Then margins and layout match the PDF download

name: Dark Mode
description: System-preference-aware dark mode for the editor UI (not the resume preview)
acceptanceCriteria: Given the user's OS is set to dark mode, When they visit the site, Then the editor UI renders in dark theme
Given dark mode is active, When viewing the resume preview, Then the preview always renders with a white background (as it will print)
Given the toggle, When I click the dark/light mode switch, Then the UI theme changes immediately without page reload

name: Multiple Resumes Management
description: Save and switch between multiple resumes stored in localStorage
acceptanceCriteria: Given I have a resume, When I click 'New Resume', Then I can create a second resume without losing the first
Given I have multiple resumes, When I view the resume list, Then each shows the name, template, and last-modified date
Given I have multiple resumes, When I delete one, Then a confirmation dialog appears before deletion

name: Custom Accent Color Picker
description: Let users customize the accent color used in templates that support it
acceptanceCriteria: Given I am using a template with accent colors (Modern, Creative, Professional), When I open the color picker, Then I can choose from 12 preset colors or enter a hex value
Given I pick a color, When the preview updates, Then all accent elements (headers, lines, icons) use the new color
Given I pick a very light color, When contrast against white background is below 3:1, Then a warning appears

name: Undo/Redo
description: Standard undo/redo for all form changes via Ctrl+Z / Ctrl+Shift+Z
acceptanceCriteria: Given I make changes in the form, When I press Ctrl+Z, Then the last change is reverted in both form and preview
Given I have undone a change, When I press Ctrl+Shift+Z, Then the change is re-applied
Given the undo stack, When it contains more than 50 entries, Then the oldest entries are dropped

name: Template Gallery Page
description: Static page showing all 5 templates with sample data and 'Use This Template' CTAs for SEO
acceptanceCriteria: Given I navigate to /templates, When the page loads, Then all 5 templates render with realistic sample data
Given I click 'Use This Template' on a template, When I am redirected, Then the builder opens with that template pre-selected
Given the page source, When I inspect meta tags, Then they target 'free resume templates' keywords

name: Affiliate & Ad Monetization
description: Kickresume affiliate links and job board display ad placements
acceptanceCriteria: Given the builder page, When I look at the sidebar below the preview, Then a non-intrusive Kickresume affiliate banner is visible
Given the landing page, When I scroll below the fold, Then job board display ads render without blocking content
Given any page, When ads load, Then they do not cause layout shift (CLS < 0.1)
Given the PDF download flow, When I click Download, Then no ads or interstitials appear before the download
